column1: # Sample: 66 QB player-seasons (2016–2025) — high-volume cohort (prior-year top tier by workload).
Prior FP/G | PPR fantasy points per game in year N — baseline benchmark.
EPA / Play | (Passing EPA + Rushing EPA) per (attempt + carry).
Rush Yards / Game | QB rushing yards per game — flags mobile QBs.
Total TDs | Passing TDs + Rushing TDs in year N.
ANY/A | Adjusted Net Yards per Attempt: (pass yds + 20·TD − 45·INT − sack yds) / (att + sacks).
CPOE | Completion percentage over expected (per attempt).
Yards / Attempt | Passing yards per attempt.
Pass Yards / Game | Passing yards per game in year N — strips out missed-game volume.
Pass Yards | Total passing yards in year N.
Pass Attempts | Total pass attempts in year N.
